issues.title: Move GPOs out of category "Windows Components"
issues.suggested_reply: @yeelam-gordon — community PR #337 touches `policies/IntelligentTerminal.admx` and `policies/en-US/IntelligentTerminal.adml`; git log shows you as the only recent committer on both policy files. 7-day SLA clock starts today. Worth a first pass?

issues.title: Eternal Terminal (step 1): per-tab /save-tab + /restore-tab (layout + content)
issues.suggested_reply: Hi @DDKinger, CI is failing on `check-spelling` - quick scan shows the check-spelling bot reported dictionary retrieval / spelling problems. Could you take a look at https://github.com/microsoft/intelligent-terminal/runs/85550128776? If it is flaky, push an empty commit (`git commit --allow-empty -m "ci: rerun"`) to re-run.

issues.title: Setting delegateAgent to a different agent than acpAgent crashes master process (wta-master pipe connect failure)
issues.suggested_reply:
Sorry you hit a crash @Aust-aa-36. For crashes specifically we need the backend diagnostic data, which you can capture via Feedback Hub: <https://aka.ms/intelligent-terminal-feedback>. Pick the matching category, hit "Share My Feedback" after submitting, and paste the link here.

Without that we can't correlate the crash to a specific stack trace.

PS: If you can also attach WTA logs from `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds), that will help confirm why the master pipe was never created.

issues.title: Improve Copilot auth flow after install
Stucked on loading
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @MartinSusky, could you grab a WTA log next time you hit this? The screenshot shows <!-- from image -->Loading...<!-- /from image --> in the Agent sessions panel, so the helper/master logs should tell us where the Claude session startup is getting stuck.

1. Reproduce the issue.
2. Zip
   `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Packages\*IntelligentTerminal*\LocalCache\Local\IntelligentTerminal\logs\`
   (or `%LOCALAPPDATA%\IntelligentTerminal\logs\` for unpackaged dev builds).
3. Attach the zip here.

If the issue is hard to reproduce, set `WTA_LOG=debug` first to get the noisier traces.

PS: Please also confirm whether the Claude CLI is installed and usable from the same PowerShell session.

issues.title: Agent Pane do not render markdown correctly
issues.suggested_reply:
Hi @haonanttt, could you share which **Intelligent Terminal version** you're on? You can find it in the **About** dialog (menu "V" button → About at the bottom). The **Windows build number** is also helpful — run `ver` or `[Environment]::OSVersion` in a shell.

This helps us tell whether it's already fixed in a newer build. <!-- from image -->The screenshot shows the agent pane rendering a Copilot response as raw Markdown markers (`**GitHub Copilot CLI**`, backticked `gpt-5.4`) instead of formatted bold/code text.<!-- /from image -->
